xvii
15
Make a Connection
Connect with the outside world. It’5 easy. All the low-level networking 
details are taken care of by classes in the java.net library. One of Java’5 best features is 
that sending and receiving data over a network is really just 1/0 with a slightly different 
connection stream at the end of the chain. In this chapter we’11 make client sockets. We’11 
make server sockets. We’11 make clients and servers. Before the chapter’5 done, you’11 have a 
fully-functional, multithreaded chat client. Did we just say multithreaded?

to port 5000 
on the server at

Socket connection
